AI AssistantEdit your showcase with plain language
Press / to see what I can add, or just type plainly. Examples:
  • /journey Asha, Ravi, Meera
  • /animate 3  (animate flow row 3)
  • add callout "Boosted retention" at 14
  • add a customer card for Retail in Singapore
Press / for the full menu. Everything is undoable with ⌘Z.
